title: rubus × gentilis
intro: Rubus × gentilis, also known as the loganberry, is a hybrid of the blackberry and raspberry plants. It is a thorny, deciduous shrub native to North America, valued for its delicious fruits and potential medicinal properties. The loganberry is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting digestive function. The fruits and leaves of the loganberry plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, jams, and infusions, making it a versatile ingredient for culinary and medicinal purposes.
